name: editor
title: Editor
description: Editable multi-line text buffer with a 2D cursor, viewport scrolling, line-number gutter, undo/redo, and optional per-line syntax tint via codeview's tokenizer. The primitive a terminal-native code editor is built around.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Build with editor.New(theme). Optionally chain WithContent(string), WithLanguage(codeview.LangGo|LangJS|LangTS|LangPy|LangRust|LangJSON|LangBash), WithWidth/WithHeight, WithGutter(false) to hide line numbers, WithTabSize(n) for the tab-to-spaces width. Drive it from your parent Update: arrows move, Home/End jump line edges, Ctrl-Home/Ctrl-End jump document edges, PgUp/PgDn jump by viewport height, Enter splits the line, Backspace/Delete remove, Tab inserts spaces, Ctrl-Z undo, Ctrl-Y redo. Every edit emits ChangeMsg{Value, Row, Col} via Cmd so a parent model can mark a tab dirty or run autosave. Cursor() reports the current 0-based (row, col); LineCount() and Dirty() power status-bars and tab indicators. The cursor line stays untokenized for clean cursor injection; all other lines route through codeview.Tokenize for syntax color.
